tasks.goal: Make MCP direct/proxy the main route for MCP-answerable data questions; QuerySpec must not block Q4/Q5.
requirements: Bypass QuerySpec main path for Tableau MCP-answerable query intents.
Keep datasource resolution, context trace, response_data normalization, renderer contract, and fallback trace.
Preserve optional QuerySpec shadow/fallback behind explicit control only.
Do not hardcode business names in Python code.
acceptance: A QuerySpec generation/validation/repair failure cannot prevent MCP main route execution.
Tests cover that Q4/Q5-like requests do not enter QuerySpec-blocked error path.

tasks.goal: Pass conversation context and datasource metadata into MCP args generation for follow-up breakdown questions.
requirements: Use prior structured context to preserve prior dimensions and executable metrics for follow-up breakdowns.
Generate MCP query args that guardrail can validate.
Do not compute business metrics in prompt or Python code.
Do not hardcode Q4 field names.
acceptance: A generic follow-up such as continuing by a time grain keeps the prior breakdown dimension.
Generated args use field object contracts accepted by mcp_args_guardrail.py.

tasks.goal: Provide a non-QuerySpec deterministic MCP orchestration path for missing-record/set-difference questions if MCP proxy cannot answer directly.
requirements: Use MCP query results as the only factual source.
Perform only deterministic set difference on returned dimension values.
Route all MCP queries through guardrail.
Do not hardcode Q5 field names.
acceptance: A generic missing-record question can return a one-column set difference table.
Trace records controlled fallback when this path is used.

tasks.goal: Ensure the new MCP-first route remains guarded and traceable.
requirements: Validate/repair structured query-datasource args used by the MCP-first route.
Reject unsafe detail scans and invalid field contracts.
acceptance: All new MCP-first structured args pass through guardrail.
Unsafe or malformed args are rejected before Tableau MCP execution.

required: live Q0-Q5 probe against current code
